channel.title: Use Case Intel — Threat Intel Feed
channel.description: High-fidelity IOCs aggregated from The Hacker News, BleepingComputer, Microsoft Security Blog and CISA KEV. Refreshed daily. CVEs/hashes via regex; domains/IPs only when defanged by the source author.

item.title: [SHA256/CRIT] 9d2da07aa6e7db3fbc36b36f0cfd74f78d5815f5ba55d0f0405cdd668bd13767
item.description:
SHA256: 9d2da07aa6e7db3fbc36b36f0cfd74f78d5815f5ba55d0f0405cdd668bd13767

Severity: crit · First seen: 2026-05-06 · Sources: Microsoft Security Blog

Context: ClickFix campaign uses fake macOS utilities lures to deliver infostealers
